failure_patterns.pattern: CLI returns conversational text instead of raw HTML
failure_patterns.fix: Add stronger prompt: 'Return ONLY raw code. No explanations, no markdown fences, no commentary.'

failure_patterns.pattern: Short outputs (<200 chars) usually mean CLI gave explanation instead of code
failure_patterns.fix: Retry with explicit instruction: 'Output MUST be the complete file starting with <!DOCTYPE html>. Do NOT explain anything.'

aaron_feedback.text: Task 14 looked good but the footer text was too small
